California permit page API-backed

Santa Monica permit portal and PermitPulse coverage

Santa Monica is listed in the PermitPulse jurisdiction catalog as an API-backed jurisdiction in California. Start with the official Citizen Access portal and use Mission Control when you need a clearer permit read.

Mission Control

Need more than the permit portal?

Santa Monica is available in PermitPulse with API-backed coverage. Mission Control keeps the current portal-first behavior intact while giving operators a cleaner route into the next action.
